'''Tusk-pigs''' were were a type of [[Swine|pig]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />
